originalTitle: The best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
summary: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. Prime Day has kicked off, though more than just Amazon is offering deals on several models we’ve tested from brands like […]
content: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. Prime Day has kicked off, though more than just Amazon is offering deals on several models we’ve tested from brands like Roborock, Dreame, and Shark. Whether you’re looking for a basic robot vacuum that can cut down on the amount of vacuuming you have to do or a high-end model that can wash and dry its own mop pads and climb over room thresholds, there are deals available across a wide range of price points. Featured Products Roborock Saros 20 Eufy Omni C28 Narwal Flow 2 Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone Roborock Saros 10 [Product: Roborock Saros 20 | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.roborock.com%2Fproducts%2Froborock-saros-20] [Product: Roborock Saros 10 | https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Froborock-saros-10-ultra-thin-self-lifting-robot-vacuum-and-mop--22000-pa-suction-hyper-force-and-multi-fuction-dock-white%2FJJ8F5PCPP3%2Fsku%2F6615280%3Firclickid%3DUHRVuG0coxyZR9pwaD3LkU4CUkuTCyS1Q2yxU00%26irgwc%3D1%26afsrc%3D1%26ref%3D198%26loc%3DVox%2520Media%26acampID%3D%26mpid%3D482924%26affgroup%3D%2522Content%2522, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.roborock.com%2Fproducts%2Froborock-saros-10] * The Roborock Q10 S5 Plus is down to $264.99 ($285 off) at Amazon, which matches its lowest price to date. The Q10 S5 Plus is one of our favorite budget-friendly robot vacuum / mop hybrids, combining good AI-powered obstacle avoidance with automatic carpet detection. It also features a vibrating mop that does a solid job scrubbing hard floors while lifting itself over rugs, and the set includes a self-emptying dock for added convenience. It can’t match the suction power or tall threshold-climbing abilities of pricier models like the Saros 20, but this is a good value under $300. * The Tapo RV30 Max Plus is another excellent budget-friendly option that’s on sale. It includes a self-emptying dock and costs $199.99 ($200 off) at Amazon. You don’t get AI-powered obstacle avoidance with this one, and its 5,200Pa suction isn’t the most powerful we’ve seen, but it’s still a capable cleaning machine with a wide mop pad that performs surprisingly well. The RV30 Max also offers excellent lidar-based navigation, support for room-specific cleaning, and Matter compatibility, allowing you to control it through all the major smart home platforms. [Product: Eufy Omni C28 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FWK41WF2?tag=theverge02-20, https://eufy-us.sjv.io/c/482924/999452/13094?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eufy.com%2Fproducts%2Ft211a110%3Fvariant%3D45573047124154] * Dreame’s X60 Max Ultra is on sale for $1,344.99 ($355 off) at Amazon, which is its best price to date. We highly recommend the Dreame X60 Ultra for homes with lots of carpet, as it combines powerful 35,000Pa suction with dual rubber brushes that excel at lifting hair and debris. It can also climb over tall thresholds and thick rugs with ease, while its spinning mop pads do a good job on hard floors and automatically detach when vacuuming carpet. Other highlights include quiet mop washing and drying along with a slim design that can fit under low furniture. * You can pick up the Dreame X60 Max Ultra’s predecessor, the Dreame X50 Ultra, for $849.99 ($750 off) at Amazon, which is $50 more than its best price to date. While its 20,000Pa suction isn’t quite as powerful as the X60 Ultra’s and it can’t tackle especially high thresholds as well, it’s still an excellent robot vacuum-mop hybrid. Its edge cleaning also isn’t quite as effective as the X60 Ultra’s, but you’re otherwise getting many of the same features for a lot less. * Dreame’s L40 Ultra Gen 2 is on sale for $384.99 ($265 off) at Amazon and $399.99 directly from Dreame. It delivers powerful 25,000Pa suction, AI-powered obstacle avoidance, and a self-cleaning dock that empties the dustbin, washes the mop, and refills its water tanks. Unlike the X50 Ultra, however, it lacks the ability to climb high thresholds or stairs. [Product: Narwal Flow 2 | https://www.amazon.com/NARWAL-Self-Cleaning-Recognition-Self-Emptying-Tangle-Free/dp/B0GFW4J291?th=1&tag=theverge02-20, https://narwalus.pxf.io/c/482924/2788060/31973?u=https%3A%2F%2Fus.narwal.com%2Fproducts%2Fnarwal-flow-2-robot-vacuum-and-mop] * The original Narwal Flow is available for $799.99 ($349 off) at Amazon, which is its best price to date. Like the Flow 2, it offers a self-cleaning roller mop along with a dock that automatically empties the dustbin and washes the mop and a tangle-resistant brush. The tradeoff is that it lacks the Flow 2’s upgraded AI-powered obstacle avoidance, uses lower-temperature water when washing the mop, and delivers slightly less suction power. * You can buy the SwitchBot K11 Plus on sale for around $189.99 ($210 off) at Amazon and directly from SwitchBot with code PDDAY53, which is $10 more than its best price. It’s a tiny bot with an equally small self-emptying dock, making it a great fit for smaller spaces. Its suction power tops out at 6,000Pa, but it’s still an effective cleaning machine with a rubber roller brush and a single side brush that does a solid job picking up dirt, dust, and debris from both hard floors and carpets. [Product: Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GL7K63NV?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fecovacs-robotics-deebot-x12-omnicyclone-robot-vacuum-and-mop-22000pa-blast-suction-focusjet-self-washing-roller-mop-bagless-station-silver%2FJ3R855QVG8, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.ecovacs.com/us/deebot-robotic-vacuum-cleaner/deebot-x12-omnicyclone] [Product: Ecovacs Deebot X9 Pro Omni | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0DZXFNVQ2/?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy
chineseTitle: Prime Day 期间提供最佳机器人吸尘器优惠
chineseSummary: 如果您一直想购买一台扫地机器人，但因购买一台好的扫地机器人的成本而犹豫不决，那么现在正是开始寻找的好时机。 Prime Day 已经拉开帷幕，尽管不仅仅是亚马逊在为我们测试过的 […] 等品牌的几种型号提供优惠。
chineseContent: 如果您一直想购买一台扫地机器人，但因购买一台好的扫地机器人的成本而犹豫不决，那么现在正是开始寻找的好时机。 Prime Day 已经拉开帷幕，尽管不仅仅是亚马逊在为我们测试过的 Roborock、Dreame 和 Shark 等品牌的几款型号提供优惠。无论您是在寻找一款可以减少吸尘量的基本型扫地机器人，还是在寻找一款可以清洗和烘干自己的拖把垫并跨越房间门槛的高端型号，都有各种价位的优惠。特色产品 Roborock Saros 20 Eufy Omni C28 Narwal Flow 2 Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone Roborock Saros 10 [产品：Roborock Saros 20 | Roborock Saros 20] https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.roborock.com%2Fproducts%2Froborock-saros-20] [产品：Roborock Saros 10 | https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Froborock-sar os-10-超薄自升式扫地拖地机器人--22000-pa-吸力-强力多功能底座-白色%2FJJ8F5PCPP3%2Fsku%2F6615280%3Firclickid%3DUHRVuG0coxyZR9pwaD3LkU4CUkuTCyS1Q2yxU00%26irgwc%3D1%26 afsrc%3D1%26ref%3D198%26loc%3DVox%2520Media%26acampID%3D%26mpid%3D482924%26affgroup%3D%2522Content%2522， https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.roborock.com%2Fproducts%2Froborock-saros-10] * Roborock Q10 S5 Plus 在亚马逊现价降至 264.99 美元（折扣 285 美元），与迄今为止的最低价格相符。 Q10 S5 Plus 是我们最喜欢的经济型扫地机器人/拖把混合机器人之一，它将良好的人工智能避障功能与自动地毯检测功能相结合。它还具有一个振动拖把，可以可靠地擦洗硬地板，同时在地毯上自行抬起，并且该套装还包括一个自动排空拖把。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
